overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game showing a character in green armor exploring a rain-soaked, dilapidated industrial district at night. The character walks past abandoned structures and vehicles while the camera follows smoothly.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial lot with green metal warehouse

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position near the barrel fire

agents.ego_description: character in green armor walks steadily through the rain-soaked industrial yard with a baseball bat on their back

entered.detail: large green metal industrial building with multiple windows and loading bays
tall metal street lamp with glowing light fixture
burning barrel providing orange light and smoke

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked abandoned industrial lot at night. A large green metal warehouse dominates the right side while a burning barrel provides warm light on the left. The character in green armor begins walking forward through the wet asphalt yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with abandoned yellow excavator

events.description: character turns left around the yellow construction vehicle
character moves from the open yard toward the narrower street

agents.ego_description: character navigates around the large yellow excavator while scanning the area

notable_agents.action: abandoned yellow excavator with rusted bucket arm sits in the center of the lot

entered.detail: large yellow construction vehicle with metal treads and excavator arm
rusted chain link fence with barbed wire topping

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around a massive yellow construction excavator sitting in the center of the industrial yard. The green warehouse recedes into the background as the character approaches a narrower street corridor between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between dilapidated stone buildings

events.description: character enters the narrower street corridor between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: character proceeds down the rain-slicked street with weapon ready

notable_agents.action: abandoned rusted sedan parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall weathered stone building with boarded windows and metal door
rickety wooden overhead walkway connecting two buildings
derelict red sedan with broken windows and rusted body

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrower street flanked by a tall stone building on the right. A wooden overpass becomes visible ahead spanning the street, while an abandoned rusted car sits parked on the left curb. Rain continues to fall steadily.

events.description: character passes underneath the wooden overpass structure
character continues straight as the alley narrows further

agents.ego_description: character walks under the wooden overpass and continues into the darkening alleyway

entered.detail: scattered rubble and wooden planks piled against the building

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath the wooden overpass, entering a more enclosed and sheltered alleyway. The stone building and abandoned car fall behind as the path narrows, with debris piles visible against the right wall. The environment grows darker as the character proceeds deeper into the industrial ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial lot that gradually narrows into a dark, enclosed alleyway. It begins in an open asphalt yard where a character in green armor walks past a large green warehouse and a glowing burning barrel. As the character turns left around a massive yellow excavator, the open yard recedes and the path shifts toward a narrower street corridor. The scene then opens onto a stretch flanked by a tall stone building and a rusted car before the character passes beneath a wooden overpass. Finally, the environment grows darker and more sheltered as the camera follows the character deeper into the industrial ruins past piles of debris.
